data.title: [2fbd-f6b8] UPDATE: Add _PLUGIN_ROOT and _PLUGIN_GIT_PATH to CLAUDE.md (no annotation docs)
data.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## What to do
Update CLAUDE.md Architecture section to document:
- _PLUGIN_ROOT pattern for all script filesystem access
- _PLUGIN_GIT_PATH derivation for git commands needing repo-relative paths
- Enforcement hook (.claude/hooks/pre-commit/check-plugin-self-ref.sh) blocks ALL plugins/dso — no suppression
Do NOT document plugin-self-ref-ok — this concept does not exist.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions _PLUGIN_ROOT
  Verify: grep -q "_PLUGIN_ROOT" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions _PLUGIN_GIT_PATH
  Verify: grep -q "_PLUGIN_GIT_PATH" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions check-plugin-self-ref.sh
  Verify: grep -q "check-plugin-self-ref" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md does NOT mention plugin-self-ref-ok
  Verify: ! grep -q "plugin-self-ref-ok" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
